ddls:
CREATE TABLE "efd_details" (
  "efd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EFD transaction */,
  "inv_number" TEXT /* Invoice number associated with the EFD transaction */,
  "ven_code" INTEGER /* Vendor code for the EFD transaction */,
  "po_number" INTEGER /* Purchase order number associated with the EFD transaction */,
  "rcr_number" INTEGER /* RCR number associated with the EFD transaction */,
  "rcr_date" TEXT /* Date of the RCR transaction */,
  "rcr_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the RCR transaction */,
  "efd_rate" TEXT /* EFD rate applied to the transaction */,
  "efd_amount" TEXT /* EFD amount calculated based on the EFD rate */,
  "efd_notes" TEXT /* Notes for the EFD transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Store ID associated with the EFD transaction */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the EFD payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the EFD transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the EFD transaction */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the EFD data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_efd_details_rcr_number FOREIGN KEY ("rcr_number") REFERENCES rcr_details ("rcr_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_efd_details_po_number FOREIGN KEY ("po_number") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("po_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_efd_details_ven_code FOREIGN KEY ("ven_code") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_code" INTEGER /* Vendor code for the vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person at the vendor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the vendor was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the vendor information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_code" INTEGER /* Store code for the store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the store (e.g., electronics, groceries) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store (e.g., city, state) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the store was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the store information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "po_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "po_number" INTEGER /* Purchase order number */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Vendor ID associated with the purchase order */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Store ID associated with the purchase order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase order was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase order (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the purchase order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the purchase order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("po_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rcr_details" (
  "rcr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RCR transaction */,
  "rcr_number" INTEGER /* RCR number */,
  "rcr_date" TEXT /* Date of the RCR transaction */,
  "rcr_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the RCR transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Store ID associated with the RCR transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the RCR transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the RCR transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the RCR transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rcr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rcr_details_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., finance team, vendor manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
